data.name: Title_ValidationFailed
data.value: Validation Failed

data.name: Title_NotFound
data.value: Not Found

data.name: Title_Forbidden
data.value: Forbidden

data.name: Title_Conflict
data.value: Conflict

data.name: Title_BadRequest
data.value: Bad Request

data.name: Title_InternalServerError
data.value: Internal Server Error

data.name: Title_PasswordChangeRequired
data.value: Password Change Required

data.name: Message_ValidationFailed_WithErrors
data.value: One or more validation errors occurred. Please check the errors field for details.

data.name: Message_ValidationFailed
data.value: The request failed validation. Please review your input and try again.

data.name: Message_NotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: Message_Forbidden
data.value: You do not have permission to perform this action.

data.name: Message_Conflict
data.value: The operation could not be completed due to a conflict with the current state of the resource.

data.name: Message_BadRequest
data.value: The request could not be understood. Please check your input and try again.

data.name: Message_InternalServerError_Production
data.value: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

data.name: Message_PasswordChangeRequired
data.value: You must change your password before accessing other resources.

data.name: Title_Unauthorized
data.value: Unauthorized

data.name: Message_InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid username or password.

data.name: Message_AccountLocked
data.value: Account is locked due to multiple failed login attempts. Please try again in {0} minutes.

data.name: Message_AccountLockedNoCountdown
data.value: Account is locked.

data.name: Message_AccountInactive
data.value: Account is inactive. Please contact your administrator.

data.name: Message_PasswordExpired
data.value: Your password has expired. Please contact your administrator to reset it.

data.name: Message_PasswordAuthDisabled
data.value: Password sign-in is currently disabled by the security policy. Please use another sign-in method or contact your administrator.

data.name: Message_InvalidRefreshToken
data.value: Invalid or expired refresh token.

data.name: Message_RefreshTokenExpired
data.value: Refresh token has expired. Please login again.

data.name: Message_MustChangePassword
data.value: You must change your password before continuing. Please login and change your password.

data.name: Message_CurrentPasswordIncorrect
data.value: Current password is incorrect.

data.name: Message_AuthenticationRequired
data.value: Authentication required. Please login again.

data.name: Message_TokenExpired
data.value: Your session has expired. Please login again.

data.name: Message_TokenInvalid
data.value: Invalid authentication token. Please login again.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_NotCurrentVersion
data.value: New versions can only be created from the current version of a vocabulary.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_SystemMajorBlocked
data.value: System vocabulary '{0}' cannot have new codes added; its values are fixed by the domain. Only 'patch' (label fixes) and 'minor' (deprecations) versions are permitted.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_CodesCannotBeRemoved
data.value: Vocabulary codes cannot be removed. Missing from the new version: {0}. Set isDeprecated=true on these codes to deprecate them instead.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_CustomValuesBlocked
data.value: Adding new codes requires a major version. The new codes ({0}) cannot be added in a {1} version — only label edits and deprecations are permitted there. Change the version type to 'major' to add the new codes.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_InvalidVersionType
data.value: Invalid version type '{0}'. Must be 'minor', 'major', or 'patch'.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_NotFound
data.value: Vocabulary with ID '{0}' was not found.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_SystemCannotDeactivate
data.value: System vocabulary '{0}' is required by the application and cannot be deactivated. To restrict a specific code, create a new vocabulary version and set isDeprecated=true on that code instead of deactivating the whole vocabulary.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_AlreadyInactive
data.value: Vocabulary '{0}' is already inactive — no action needed.

data.name: Message_Vocabulary_HasActiveDependencies
data.value: Vocabulary '{0}' cannot be deactivated while {1} active records still reference its codes. Create a new vocabulary version and deprecate the codes individually (isDeprecated=true), or migrate the dependent records first.
